zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert DE BETHUNE於1035年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯貝圖內時，他的父親Robert de Béthune II21歲，母親Berthilde D OLHAIN28歲。他和Giselberthe D’Halluin至少有1個兒子。他去世於1101年10月享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: DE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: BETHUNE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert DE BETHUNE was born in 1035, in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Robert de Béthune II, was 21 and his mother, Berthilde D OLHAIN, was 28. He had at least 1 son with Giselberthe D’Halluin. He died in October 1101, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert DE BETHUNE est né en 1035, à Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Robert de Béthune II, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Berthilde D OLHAIN, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Giselberthe D’Halluin. Il est décédé en octobre 1101, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert DE BETHUNE 1035 in Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Béthune II 21 und seine Mutter Berthilde D OLHAIN 28. Er hatte mit Giselberthe D’Halluin mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb im Oktober 1101 im Alter von 66 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert DE BETHUNE è nato il nel 1035 nel Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Robert de Béthune II, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Berthilde D OLHAIN, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Giselberthe D’Halluin. Morì nel ottobre 1101, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert DE BETHUNEが1035年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスブeスウンで生まれた時，父Robert de Béthune IIは21歳，母Berthilde D OLHAINは28歳であった。彼はGiselberthe D’Halluinとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1101年10月に66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert DE BETHUNE(이)가 1035년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 브e툰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Béthune II(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Berthilde D OLHAIN(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Giselberthe D’Halluin(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1101년 10월 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert DE BETHUNE nasceu em 1035, em Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Robert de Béthune II, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Berthilde D OLHAIN, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Giselberthe D’Halluin. Ele faleceu em outubro de 1101, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert DE BETHUNE родился в 1035 г. в местности бeтун, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Béthune II было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Berthilde D OLHAIN, 28. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Giselberthe D’Halluin. Он умер октябрь 1101 г. в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert DE BETHUNE nació en 1035, en Béthune, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Robert de Béthune II, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Berthilde D OLHAIN, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Giselberthe D’Halluin. Murió en octubre de 1101, a la edad de 66 años.
